title: Enhancing Transparency: Yemi Ogundipe and Odume Festus Engage with ISSB Standards for Better Sustainability Reporting - FinancialEDGE
description: Industry leaders engage in ISSB-aligned disclosure training in Lagos, Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director, Financial Edge, and Yemi Ogundipe, Managing Director of Omatek Plc, participated in a technical training program focused on enhancing understanding of the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) requirements. html:
Industry leaders engage in ISSB-aligned disclosure training in Lagos, Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director, Financial Edge, and Yemi Ogundipe, Managing Director of Omatek Plc, participated in a technical training program focused on enhancing understanding of the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) requirements.

The training aimed to support high-quality disclosures by helping preparers grasp ISSB standards for sustainability reporting. The program was a joint initiative of FRCN, SEC, NGX RegCo, and EY, highlighting a coordinated approach to advancing sustainability reporting in Nigeria.

Odume Festus, actively involved in financial and sustainability discussions and Yemi Ogundipe, brings industry perspective to the ISSB training.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge and Yemi Ogundipe Managing Director Omatek Plc at a technical training programme designed to support high-quality disclosures by helping preparers understand the requirements of the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB), in Lagos.
